Pants and Leggings For Girls

Diverse, versatile, and comfortable, our collection of pants for girls includes jeans, leggings, and sweatpants which have been designed to be worn for school as well as socializing. As with all our kids' clothes, our pants are comfortable to wear, walk, and run in and complement all our tops and footwear. Trendy styles mix with perennial designs which results in plain as well as patterned pants in this fashionable collection.
